product_overview: QuizOrb is a local-first, real-time multiplayer quiz app that lets hosts generate or author question sets (preset topics, AI prompts, or file imports), create playable rooms, and run synchronous trivia with live leaderboards and replay.
core_goals: Create quiz question sets from preset topics, custom AI prompts, or uploaded files.
Set up and start a live multiplayer quiz room that players can join by code or deep link.
Allow players to join a room, answer questions in real time, and see live leaderboard updates.
Provide an easy host workflow to share room links/codes and reset a finished game for another run.

features.name: Landing and navigation
features.description: Entry point for new or returning users to start creating or joining games without authentication.
user_flows: Open / -> Choose to create a game -> Open /create -> Begin quiz setup
Open / -> Choose to join a game -> Open /join -> Enter room code and player name to join

features.name: Trivia generation from preset topics
features.description: Generate a complete trivia question set by selecting a curated topic and number of questions.
user_flows: Open /create -> Enter a quiz title and host name -> Select Trivia mode -> Choose a preset topic and question count -> Generate questions -> Review the generated question set

features.name: Trivia generation from custom AI prompt
features.description: Create questions by providing a free-form topic prompt to the AI generator and selecting quantity.
user_flows: Open /create -> Select Trivia mode -> Switch source to AI -> Enter a custom topic prompt -> Pick a question count -> Generate questions -> Review the generated question set

features.name: Trivia generation from uploaded file
features.description: Upload a supported document (PDF, DOCX, TXT) and generate questions from its extracted text.
user_flows: Open /create -> Select Trivia mode -> Switch source to File -> Choose a supported local file -> Pick a question count -> Generate from file -> Review the generated question set
Open /create -> Select Trivia mode -> Switch source to File -> Choose an unsupported file type -> See inline file type error

features.name: Social and custom quiz creation
features.description: Produce social-style packs (e.g., 'Who Knows Me Best') or author bespoke questions and answers manually.
user_flows: Open /create -> Select Social mode -> Generate the social pack -> Review generated pack and optionally prefill host answers
Open /create -> Select Custom mode -> Add question text and four options and mark the correct answer for each draft -> Review the authored question set

features.name: Room creation
features.description: Create a playable room once questions and required metadata are ready, then proceed to host the lobby.
user_flows: Complete question generation or custom question authoring -> Enter quiz title and host name -> Choose whether the host plays or spectates -> Create room -> View the generated room code and proceed to the host lobby

features.name: Join by code or deep link
features.description: Players can join existing rooms by entering a room code or following a prefilled deep link (?code=).
user_flows: Open /join?code=ROOM01 -> Confirm or edit the room code -> Enter a player name -> Submit the join form -> Arrive on the player room screen
Open /join -> Enter an invalid room code -> Enter a player name -> Submit the join form -> See inline invalid room code error
Open /join -> Enter a room code -> Enter a player name already in use -> Submit the join form -> See inline duplicate name error

features.name: Lobby sharing and multiplayer presence
features.description: Hosts share room links or codes and watch live lobby updates as players arrive.
user_flows: Create a room and arrive in the host lobby -> Copy room code or share a direct join link -> Distribute the code or link to participants -> Observe the player list update as participants join

features.name: Real-time gameplay and answer submission
features.description: Synchronous question delivery with timers; players submit one answer per question and timeouts auto-submit no-answer.
user_flows: Wait in the lobby for the host to start the game -> View each question with a countdown timer -> Select an answer before the timer expires -> Observe transition to the next stage after answering
Wait in the lobby for the host to start the game -> View a question and let the timer expire without answering -> Observe auto-submission as no answer and transition to the next stage

features.name: Leaderboard and finished state
features.description: Show interim and final rankings with score deltas between rounds and a game-over state at the end.
user_flows: Finish or wait out a question -> View leaderboard updates with rank and score delta -> Continue through subsequent questions until the game ends -> View final standings in the finished state

features.name: Play again reset
features.description: Allow the host to reset a finished room so all connected clients return to the lobby for another run.
user_flows: Finish a game as the host -> Choose Play Again -> Observe the room return to lobby state for another run
Finish a game as a player -> Observe the room reset and return to the lobby when the host triggers Play Again

routes.description: Landing page with product overview and entry points for creating or joining a game.
Quiz setup flow for trivia, social, and custom game creation.
Join form that accepts room code and player name, including deep links via ?code=.
Host room experience with lobby, live gameplay screens, leaderboard, and play again controls.
Player room experience with lobby, question answering, leaderboard, and finished state.

features.name: Landing and navigation
features.description: Users can enter the app from a branded landing page and navigate to create or join flows without authentication.
user_interactions: Open the landing page.
Click "Create Game" to go to the quiz setup flow.
Click "Join Game" to go to the room join flow.

features.name: Trivia generation from preset topics
features.description: Hosts can generate quiz questions by choosing a preset trivia topic and question count.
user_interactions: Open /create.
Enter a quiz title and host name.
Select Trivia mode.
Choose a preset topic and question count.
Click "Generate Questions".
Review the generated question set before room creation.

api_calls.description: Generates AI trivia questions for a selected topic and count.

features.name: Trivia generation from custom AI prompt
features.description: Hosts can provide a free-form topic and request AI-generated trivia questions.
user_interactions: Open /create.
Select Trivia mode.
Switch source to AI.
Enter a custom topic prompt.
Pick a question count.
Click "Generate Questions".

api_calls.description: Generates AI trivia questions for a custom topic prompt.

features.name: Trivia generation from uploaded file
features.description: Hosts can upload a PDF, DOCX, or TXT file and generate quiz questions from its contents.
user_interactions: Open /create.
Select Trivia mode.
Switch source to File.
Choose a supported local file.
Pick a question count.
Click "Generate from File".
Review the generated questions or error message.

api_calls.description: Uploads a file and generates questions from extracted text.

features.name: Social and custom quiz creation
features.description: Hosts can create social packs like Who Knows Me Best and Hot Seat, or manually author custom questions.
user_interactions: Open /create.
Select a social mode or Custom mode.
For social mode, generate the pack questions and optionally prefill host answers.
For custom mode, add question text, four options, and the correct answer for each draft.
Review the generated or authored question set.

api_calls.description: Retrieves generated social pack questions for the chosen mode.

features.name: Room creation
features.description: Hosts can create a playable room after questions are ready and required metadata is filled in.
user_interactions: Complete question generation or custom question authoring.
Enter quiz title and host name.
Choose whether the host plays or spectates when applicable.
Click "Create Room".
View the generated room code and continue to the host lobby.

api_calls.description: Creates a room with quiz metadata, mode, host role, and question payloads.

features.name: Join by code or deep link
features.description: Players can join from the join form, including when the room code is prefilled through a ?code= URL parameter.
user_interactions: Open /join or a /join?code=ROOM01 deep link.
Confirm or edit the room code.
Enter a player name.
Submit the form to join the room.
Navigate to the player room screen on success or view an inline error on failure.

api_calls.description: Requests entry into an existing room with room code and player name.

features.name: Lobby sharing and multiplayer presence
features.description: Hosts can copy room codes or share links while players see live lobby updates as participants join.
user_interactions: Open the host lobby.
Copy the room code or the direct join link.
Use WhatsApp or X share links.
Watch the player list update as participants join.

api_calls.description: Pushes live room state updates, including connected players and lobby status.

features.name: Real-time gameplay and answer submission
features.description: Players receive live questions, answer once per round, and are auto-submitted with no answer when the timer expires.
user_interactions: Wait in the lobby for the host to start.
View each question and countdown timer.
Select an answer before time runs out.
Wait for the next stage after answering or timeout.

api_calls.description: Starts the quiz from the host lobby.
Pushes the next question payload to host and players.
Sends the selected answer index for the current question.

features.name: Leaderboard and finished state
features.description: Players and hosts see leaderboard updates between rounds and a final game-over state when the quiz ends.
user_interactions: Finish or wait out a question.
View rank, score, and score delta updates on the leaderboard.
Continue through subsequent questions until the game ends.

api_calls.description: Pushes live scoreboard updates after each question.
Pushes the final standings when the quiz is complete.

features.name: Play again reset
features.description: The host can reset a finished room to return all connected clients to the lobby for another round.
user_interactions: Finish a game in the host room.
Click "Play Again".
Observe the room return to lobby state for another run.

api_calls.description: Resets a finished room back to the lobby state.

known_limitations: Join-page room-code validation is limited to presence and uppercase formatting on the client; invalid codes are rejected only after the socket request.
Duplicate player-name handling is delegated to the server and surfaced as inline join errors.
Play Again is only exposed in the host finished screen; players rely on room updates to return to the lobby.
File-upload generation accepts only PDF, DOCX, and TXT files from the browser picker.
